## Why

Describe the user problem and why this change is the smallest complete solution.

## What changed

Summarize behavior, tests, documentation, and migrations.

## Verification

- [ ] `python dev.py` prints `ALL GREEN`.
- [ ] Focused tests cover the changed behavior and failure path.
- [ ] User-facing behavior is documented in the same change.
- [ ] Every public benchmark number traces to `benchmarks/results/`.
- [ ] The free, local-first core and explicit LLM-spend consent are preserved.
- [ ] Security implications and any remaining debt are documented.
- [ ] No credentials, caches, private brains, or unrelated files are included.
